office_address: 3252 Holiday Court, Suite 208, La Jolla, CA 92037
integration_constraints: Do not interact with proprietary monitoring software
UL compliance required - log every call with timestamp, caller name, number, location, alarm type, and disposition
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, state business hours, confirm if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address, attempt transfer to on-call. If transfer fails, assure 15-min callback. If non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name and callback number, transfer to appropriate team during 08:00–17:00 America/Los_Angeles. If transfer fails, confirm 30-min callback.
